final:
module top_module (
        input p,
        input q,
        input r,
        output reg h);assign h = ( ~p & ~q & ~r ) |
				( ~p & q & ~r ) |
				( p & ~q & ~r ) |
				( p & q & r ) ;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      h <= ~p & ~q & ~r;
      h <= ~p & q & ~r;
      h <= p & ~q & ~r;
      h <= p & q & r;
    end
  end

endmodule
